# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest major version tag (e.g. `v1`) receives security updates.
Older major versions are not supported unless explicitly stated.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

To report a vulnerability, please open a [private security advisory](https://github.com/elpic/actions/security/advisories/new).

You should receive a response within 48 hours. If you don't, please follow up.
